body:
## Review Summary

Clean fix. The old code called `init_datadir` first, which always created the directory if missing — making the "does not exist" branch unreachable and silently "succeeding" even with no database. The new early-return guards correctly replicate the safety checks from `init_datadir` (exists + is_dir) while downgrading the is-not-a-directory case from a panic to a warning, which is more appropriate for a removal command. All other `remove_db` callers (`import`, `import-bench`, L2 `init-dev`) are unaffected since their corresponding `init_datadir` calls happen separately.
